## What changed

Describe the problem and the smallest useful change.

## Evidence

List exact test, reproduction, or evaluation commands and their outcomes.

## Benchmark impact

- [ ] No prompts, tools, policies, task state, graders, metrics, simulator output, or published
      result changes.
- [ ] Result-affecting change; I updated the task/software version and changelog.

## Data, security, and disclosure

- [ ] No real employer/customer data, credentials, hidden oracle values, or restricted assets.
- [ ] Data and adapted material have documented provenance and compatible licenses.
- [ ] I disclosed relevant AI assistance and conflicts required by the target project.
